description: Three-bucket task-type taxonomy for unified benchmark analysis. Each task maps to exactly one type based on its primary activity.

comprehension.description: Tasks where the agent must understand, navigate, and explain code without modifying it. Output is analysis, documentation, or structured answers.
comprehension.output_form: analysis artifact (answer.json, documentation.md, or structured report)

implementation.description: Tasks where the agent must write or modify code to add features, fix bugs, refactor, or migrate systems.
implementation.output_form: code changes (patch, new files, modified files)

quality.description: Tasks where the agent must assess code for correctness, security, performance, or compliance and produce findings or fixes.
quality.primary_activity: audit, test, debug, or secure code
quality.output_form: findings report, test suite, security fixes, or diagnostic output
